title: Oil, rice, textiles & more: The cost Indians may have to pay for Iran-Israel war
description: Iran-Israel War: India feels the pinch as the Israel-Iran conflict pushes up prices for pulses and onions. Exports of rice, textiles, and electronics are hampered by delays and higher freight costs. Strained shipping lanes and volatile markets are forcing a rethink of logistics. Essential imports and strategic sectors hang in the balance, with broader economic fallout likely if tensions rise.
